name: qiaomu-ppt
license_name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 only
release_gates: validate_skill.py passes
trigger_eval.py passes
reports/skill-ir.json exists
vendored MIT-derived SVG/PPTX code is attributed in NOTICE.md and does not require an external upstream skill at runtime

references/pptx-skill-method-adaptation.md documents the Qiaomu-owned adaptation of Anthropic pptx skill workflow ideas, including route separation, template layout inventory, native PPT object pitfalls, and fix-and-verify QA, without copying proprietary upstream text or code
scripts/check_project.py has argparse help
scripts/recommend_style.py has argparse help and sample recommendations

data/ppt_guided_choice_flow.json and references/guided-choice-flow.md define the productized guided-choice entry flow: initial broad PPT requests show compact choice cards with recommended defaults, short replies such as 1A 2B 3C 4A 5A or 生成/默认 start research/planning rather than final rendering, strict approval-bypass phrases are separated from ordinary task verbs, production choices include image-generation/API policy plus PPTX/PDF/HTML/Keynote output formats, and optional non-blocking provider setup choices for GPT-image/OpenAI, Nanobanana, Seedream/即梦, Jimeng, or another compatible API without hardcoding unverified endpoints or asking users to paste API keys into chat

data/visual_character_families.json and references/visual-character-and-style-picker.md define Qiaomu-owned internal visual-character families, a forced-choice style picker, and style remix arbitration learned from public design-reference libraries without copying exact upstream DESIGN.md files or Claude-specific prompts

data/ppt_generation_recipes.json and references/deck-generation-recipes.md define reusable URL/article, README, PDF/report, interactive HTML, and speaker-notes workflows as source-to-deck recipes rather than slide templates

references/ppt-anti-slop.md defines PPT-specific anti-slop fingerprints and repair moves for generic gradients/orbs, nested card soup, default slide chrome, fake evidence, decorative icon stacks, CJK title leading, and title/image collisions

scripts/style_direction.py has argparse help and turns selected style/layout recommendations into style_direction.json/md with asset-density targets, media policy, chart policy, non-negotiables, warnings, and per-slide layout program; prepare_deck_project.py writes it by default
scripts/recommend_layout.py has argparse help and sample recommendations

scripts/plan_image_layouts.py has argparse help and computes image/text layout slots from real image aspect ratios across named canvas formats ppt169, ppt43, xiaohongshu/xhs, moments, story, wechat, banner, and a4; it applies portrait-canvas overrides, validates readable text-area minimums, outputs preserveAspectRatio policy, multi-image plans, JSON, and Markdown handoff tables

image-rich slide contracts document layout clearance between protected title/body/proof/caption boxes and image slots, plus image finish policy for real clipping, low-contrast borders, subtle shadows, color normalization, and avoiding fake rounded frames
scripts/url_to_markdown.py has argparse help, URL smoke test, and local/remote PDF page-image rendering into source image candidates when Poppler is available
scripts/paper_to_markdown.py has argparse help and arXiv/Hugging Face paper URL normalization smoke tests

scripts/source_to_markdown.py routes arXiv/Hugging Face paper inputs and WeChat public-account article inputs before generic URL extraction, renders local/folder/ZIP PDF page images through the PDF intake route, extracts embedded images from DOCX/PPTX/XLSX/EPUB packages into source image candidates with provenance, and writes first-pass source_notes.md/source_cards.json by default

scripts/source_intake_matrix_smoke.py has argparse help and runs an offline source intake regression matrix across generated Markdown, HTML, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, image, and ZIP fixtures, enforcing source_to_markdown.py output for source_manifest.json, extracted Markdown, source cards, image candidates, and honest missing-evidence flags

scripts/source_cards.py has argparse help and builds source_notes.md/source_cards.json from source_manifest.json while preserving source image provenance such as original source_path and PDF page, filters Wikipedia/navigation/ad/bibliography noise, ranks factual source-relevant claims above footnotes, and can keep Chinese-facing claims while preserving raw English evidence

scripts/prepare_deck_project.py writes research_dossier.md from source_notes/source_cards/source_manifest plus model-knowledge assumptions and gaps, and design_proposal.md includes a page-by-page slide_plan_for_confirmation table before rendering

scripts/source_adequacy.py has argparse help and writes reports/source_adequacy.json/md with source count, text volume, source-card count, image candidates, source-like visual assets, and style evidence-page targets; prepare_deck_project.py writes it by default and produce_deck.py fails professional/final early when source evidence is too thin

scripts/content_outline_audit.py has argparse help and writes reports/content_outline_audit.json/md before rendering, scoring source-backed claims, concrete anchors, claim-title quality, story contract completeness, source material depth, and anti-generic copy; produce_deck.py enforces it for professional/final runs

scripts/element_plan_audit.py has argparse help and writes reports/element_plan_audit.json/md before rendering, scoring proof-object coverage, component-plan coverage, layout/media intent, element diversity, visual-asset queue readiness, and source-visual priority; produce_deck.py enforces it for professional/final runs

scripts/style_fit_audit.py has argparse help and writes reports/style_fit_audit.json/md before rendering, scoring selected-style identity, content-domain fit, style contract completeness, density targets, slide-level layout program coverage, media policy alignment, and generated-image boundaries; produce_deck.py enforces it for professional/final runs

scripts/topic_research.py has argparse help, supports fast/balanced/deep topic research, decomposes compound natural-language topics into focus entities for Wikipedia/Wikidata fallback, records candidates and provider gaps, and ingests selected URLs into source_manifest/source_cards

scripts/outline_from_source_cards.py has argparse help and creates content_contract.json plus slide_plan_seed.json from source_cards.json while keeping raw English evidence out of visible Chinese slide anchors, preserving it as source_evidence_raw for notes/provenance, writing short non-ellipsis claim titles instead of truncated source sentences, and separating narrative_role from executable Lxx-derived component_type values such as process_flow, concept_map, and chart_with_takeaway

scripts/prepare_deck_project.py has argparse help and prepares topic/file/link projects with deck_brief, style_brief, design_proposal, automatic fast topic research when needed, automatic supplemental topic research when provided sources are too thin, source cards, content contract, slide-plan seed, visual contract, selected-source-visual resolution, source adequacy reports, and honest needs_research status when research is skipped or unavailable

scripts/create_deck.py has argparse help and provides a one-command topic/file/link wrapper that runs prepare_deck_project.py, forwards automatic supplemental source research controls, optionally runs produce_deck.py with quality-profile/formats/image-generation settings, and writes deck_create_manifest.json/deck_create_report.md
scripts/bootstrap.py has argparse help and dependency check

scripts/background_prompt_pack.py has argparse help and emits 5 role-based atmosphere-only generated background prompts by default, with hard bans on unsupplied source/product/music props such as vinyl records, CDs, album covers, booklets, instruments, screenshots, documents, and logos
scripts/visual_asset_manifest.py has argparse help and init/render-md/validate smoke tests

scripts/image_art_direction.py has argparse help and creates per-slide art-direction briefs, negative prompts, safe areas, non-invented-prop boundaries, and gpt-image/Codex generation queues before image materialization; it re-queues Generated AI rows whose generator is procedural-preview-fallback so real image generation can replace preview assets, while source visual fallback rows remain marked preview_fallback_only and skipped from real image-generation queues

scripts/stage_image_generation.py has argparse help and stages queue items into prompt files, metadata files, request JSONL, expected output paths, and import mappings for Codex/gpt-image/external image generation while skipping source visual fallback rows from stale or fresh queues

scripts/built_in_image_generation_guide.py has argparse help and writes assets/images/built_in_image_generation_tasks.json plus built_in_image_generation_guide.md for Codex or host-native image generation, grouping pending AI assets into 3-4 image batches with expected output paths, prompts, negative prompts, text policy, safe area, non-invented-prop rules, source-fallback skips, and exact import_generated_assets.py continuation commands

scripts/image_generation_readiness.py has argparse help and writes reports/image_generation_readiness.json/md with AI asset, procedural fallback, unresolved-source fallback, formal queue, skipped source-fallback queue rows, staging batch, host-native built-in image guide status, provider preset, API key env presence, latest run, API recovery commands, and Codex/host-native image-generation continuation commands before professional/final production gates; when visual_asset_manifest.json contains no primary AI assets, stale image-generation batches are warning-only and no image-generation commands are recommended

scripts/run_image_generation.py has argparse help, consumes the staged image-generation queue, supports explicit dry-run vs --preflight vs --execute image generation through provider presets, checks SDK/key/provider readiness before paid calls, supports OpenAI SDK, OpenAI-compatible HTTP, X-API-Key Jimeng proxy, and async task submit/poll providers, normalizes outputs to 1600x900, imports generated files into visual_asset_manifest.json, and refuses to call paid providers when the configured API key env var is missing

scripts/svg_deck_from_slide_plan.py has argparse help, clears stale SVG and notes files on --force, reads style_direction.json before rendering, projects selected styles into spec_lock.json render_style plus palette/material/component_language/proof_language tokens such as eastern-rice-paper+ink-seal-paper+ink-artifact-proof, blueprint-grid+blueprint-annotation+blueprint-formula-rails, brutalist-newsprint+newspaper-rulebox+newspaper-proof-columns, risograph-zine+riso-overprint+riso-proof-collage, and luxury-editorial-paper+folio-hairline+folio-proof-spread, and creates SVG-first pages plus design_spec/spec_lock manifests with semantic top-level SVG group IDs mirrored into spec_lock.json
scripts/svg_quality_checker.py has argparse help and validates PPT-safe SVG pages
scripts/svg_preview.py has argparse help and renders browser screenshots plus a thumbnail grid

scripts/finalize_svg.py has argparse help and finalizes SVG pages before PPTX export, including SVG-display-size-aware raster downsampling by default with an explicit opt-out for original-resolution source images and a raw-byte fallback when malformed or extremely small rasters fail PIL re-encoding
scripts/svg_to_pptx.py has argparse help and exports native DrawingML PPTX without external pptx skill runtime dependency

scripts/produce_deck.py has argparse help and runs the formal production pipeline from source adequacy, upstream content-outline/element-plan/style-fit audits, image art-direction preflight, staging preflight, built-in image-generation guide preflight, quality-profile preflight, optional safe contract repair preflight, and real image generation preflight/import through visual-asset validation, force-refreshed SVG generation, visual rhythm check, style execution audit, preview gate evidence, downsample-aware SVG finalization, PPTX export, multi-format bundle, PPTX text check, project check, deck quality benchmarking, and benchmark-derived repair planning; default formats are PPTX/PDF/formal HTML/parity HTML, default quality-profile professional enforces upstream creation audits, real imagegen evidence, benchmark >=75, style execution audit, and critical repair failure, auto-adds Keynote for professional/final runs on capable macOS machines, and defaults production Keynote export to keynote09 with --no-auto-keynote opt-out

scripts/visual_rhythm_check.py has argparse help and checks art-direction variety, page-rhythm variety, adjacent repetition, image usage, and SVG structural fingerprints that include image-slot position so left/right/top/full image layouts are not collapsed into one rhythm

scripts/style_execution_audit.py has argparse help and scores whether selected style_direction.json is actually executed through style contract presence, renderer render_style/component_language/proof_language token evidence, SVG style canvas execution that reads svg_output for component/material markers, SVG proof canvas execution that reads svg_output for proof_language and material-specific proof markers, per-slide layout-program matching across ITL, Lxx candidates, and proof-object-to-component mapping, component specificity, visual/source density alignment, art-direction rhythm, and repetition control, writing reports/style_execution_audit.json/md and supporting --enforce

scripts/style_matrix_smoke.py has argparse help and runs a temporary multi-style renderer regression matrix across eastern, blueprint, newsprint, risograph, and luxury style cases by mutating style_direction.json, regenerating SVG, enforcing style_execution_audit.py, and writing reports/style_matrix_smoke.json/md

scripts/deck_quality_benchmark.py has argparse help and scores generated decks against ppt-master learning-catalog statistics for upstream creation quality, rhythm, style execution, layout-pattern execution, image presence, image diversity, source visual usage, real image generation, source grounding, image-resolution fit, export coverage, and contract completeness; it reads content_outline_audit/element_plan_audit/style_fit_audit evidence, regenerates visual rhythm evidence from svg_output when the report is missing, regenerates style execution evidence when style_direction.json exists, counts terminal source/web/user visual assets as source grounding, scores source/web/user terminal visual coverage instead of penalizing absent AI generation when no primary AI assets are required, derives executed rich component families from both component_type and Lxx layout ids, detects adjacent exact-image repeats and overused image assets, detects underresolved SVG image placements so severe upscaling caps the score, and adjusts export coverage targets by Keynote feasibility/request so ppt_master_ready requires real .key evidence whenever Keynote is targeted

scripts/deck_repair_plan.py has argparse help and converts deck_quality_benchmark.json into prioritized critical/high/medium repair actions with target artifacts, next edits, and verification commands so low-quality decks get a concrete contract-level repair path instead of only a score, including upstream creation repairs, style execution repairs, image diversity repairs for adjacent exact-image repeats, and overused visual assets

scripts/page_content_guide.py has argparse help and writes page_content_guide.json, page_content_guide.md, and page_content/*.md by combining slide_plan.json, source_cards.json, visual_asset_manifest.json, notes/*.md, and QA reports into an easy-to-review per-page content guide; produce_deck.py runs it automatically after benchmark and repair planning

scripts/deck_repair_apply.py has argparse help and applies safe deterministic repair actions to deck_brief.md, style_brief.md, slide_plan.json, visual_contract.json, visual_asset_manifest.json, assets/images/image_prompts.json/md, content_contract.json, and spec_lock.json before SVG generation, including repetitive-layout rhythm repair, without fabricating sources, image files, or generated assets

scripts/plan_visual_assets.py matches source_card_ids and image/page/figure media needs to source image_candidates, filters site chrome/logo/icon/wordmark/UI candidates before selecting source visuals, promotes usable source images into visual_asset_rows.json with project-relative sources/images paths plus source_path/source_page provenance, backfills image-friendly slides from already resolved topic-level source visuals when their own source cards have no usable image, balances source image usage so extracted Office/EPUB/PDF/URL visuals are used before repeating one candidate, reuses already-resolved source images within repetition caps before creating AI rows, creates additional source rows for ITL13/ITL14 comparison slides when multiple source image candidates exist, and adds AI fallback rows for unresolved remote source images so previews do not render empty visual slots

scripts/resolve_source_visuals.py has argparse help and downloads only selected Needs-Manual source visual rows, retries transient image-download failures, tries Wikimedia thumbnail original-file variants, records attempt diagnostics, filters tiny/non-image responses, caches repeated URLs, saves files under sources/images/resolved-source-visuals, backfills source_cards/source_manifest/visual_asset_rows/visual_asset_manifest, and marks same-slide AI fallbacks dormant when source evidence resolves

scripts/svg_deck_from_slide_plan.py records per-slide art_direction and executable component_type in spec_lock.json, uses style-aware renderer palette/material/component_language/proof_language tokens from style_direction.json, writes data-render-style/data-render-material/data-component-language/data-proof-language trace attributes on each SVG root, applies component language to title markers, cards, source object panels, and page-level style folios, applies proof_language ornaments to comparison, source comparison, process, mechanism, chart, concept-map, source-evidence, source screenshot annotation, and source data regions, uses stronger generic editorial archetypes for cover, context, core text, mechanism, conflict, comparison, image-led story pages, source-evidence spreads, source-aware process-flow pages, source-aware concept-map pages, source top-feature pages, multi-source before/after ITL13/ITL14 pages, source screenshot annotation ITL18 pages, wide data/source chart ITL20 pages, pull-quote spreads, and closing pages, lets explicit Lxx layout_pattern_id values own component_type mapping so L13/L18/L20/L24/L31/L34/L35 become distinct SVG compositions, carries visual_asset_manifest source metadata into rendering, reads local image dimensions where available, avoids stretching low-resolution source/user/web evidence images into full-bleed or oversized slots by presenting them as source objects at safe size, preserves PDF/source pages with meet fitting, alternates source-evidence layouts, avoids accidental first-image reuse on body slides, preserves image contrast with local scrims instead of whole-slide wash, locks all palette colors and render_style/component_language/proof_language in spec_lock.md/json, and uses looser CJK title leading for long Chinese titles
scripts/materialize_visual_assets.py regenerates procedural preview fallbacks with --force and emits 16:9 1600x900 PNG assets to avoid blurry full-bleed SVG usage
scripts/pptx_from_slide_plan.py has argparse help and creates low-complexity fallback editable PPTX without external pptx skill runtime dependency
scripts/pptx_preview.py has argparse help, clears stale slide previews before rerendering, and renders LibreOffice/Poppler preview evidence when tools are installed

scripts/pptx_text_check.py has argparse help and checks slide-plan title parity, placeholders, visible internal metadata, and whether normal editable PPTX exports are mostly full-slide raster images masquerading as editable foreground content

normal editable PPTX delivery forbids whole-slide image-backed decks unless the artifact is explicitly labelled parity preview, social-image output, or user-approved non-editable draft; high-fidelity previews and PPTX must share the same layout/style contract instead of drifting into a crude editable redraw

scripts/export_bundle.py has argparse help and incrementally writes export_manifest.json for PPTX/PDF/formal HTML/parity HTML/Keynote status plus keynote_capability.json, defaults to PPTX/PDF/formal HTML/parity HTML for fast normal runs, reuses only fresh PDF/parity/Keynote artifacts, supports opt-in Keynote via --formats ...,keynote and --keynote-strategy auto/modern/keynote09 so verified Keynote 09 fallback can skip slow modern-save timeouts, without external pptx skill dependency
scripts/keynote_capability.py has argparse help and reports macOS/osascript/Keynote.app readiness, with optional Keynote version and strict exit-code checks
scripts/keynote_smoke.py has argparse help and runs a real Keynote export smoke through export_bundle.py plus check_project.py, writing reports/keynote_smoke.json and reports/keynote_smoke.md
scripts/keynote_probe.py has argparse help and diagnoses Keynote launch, PPTX open/import, modern save, Keynote 09 fallback, freshness, cleanup, and minimal native PPTX control stages
scripts/procedural_background_pack.py has argparse help and emits 5 deterministic atmosphere-only SVG fallback backgrounds
scripts/icon_search.py has argparse help, supports local QM icons plus Iconify sets such as lucide and heroicons, and records provider/license/source on export
scripts/build_ppt_master_catalog.py has argparse help and can refresh the ppt-master example learning catalog from a local examples snapshot

scripts/ppt_master_axis_audit.py has argparse help and verifies ppt-master-grade work as independent mode, visual_style, image_rendering, image_palette_behavior, image_type_strategy, primary-media, image-role, and page-execution contracts before final rendering
requirements.txt exists
data/dependency_manifest.json declares PDF/PPTX/image/procedural-background tooling
data/font_manifest.json declares open-source Chinese and Latin PPT fonts with display, courseware, and code packs
data/design_style_presets.json covers 74 derived style presets
data/ppt_master_case_styles.json covers ppt-master case-derived style packs without runtime dependency
data/ppt_master_examples_catalog.json indexes all 21 studied ppt-master examples, materials, local image counts, page rhythm, and page charts

data/ppt_master_axis_catalog.json records Qiaomu-owned mode, visual style, image rendering, image palette, image type template, and hero primitive catalogs learned from the latest ppt-master structure without copying upstream prompt text or templates

data/html_style_archetypes.json declares the six user-facing HTML/PPT style archetypes, keeps design-history terms hidden from normal users, and maps each scenario choice to internal style families, media policy, layout intent, and preview requirements

data/html_motion_presets.json and references/html-motion.md define opt-in formal HTML motion levels for CSS, GSAP, Lottie, and dotLottie, including static fallback, reduced-motion, local asset, and PPTX parity boundaries

data/ppt_design_methodology.json declares the reusable six-layer PPT generation ontology, generation loop, learning source taxonomy, promotion requirements, and naming policy for extensible methodology upgrades

data/ppt_design_methodology.json includes an HTML design-agent research source category that absorbs design-context binding, targeted edit discipline, static editable slide markup, review anchors, projection-safe type scale, and verification-to-repair loops without copying proprietary prompt text or runtime APIs
data/image_text_layout_patterns.json covers 20 reusable PPT image-text layout patterns with ITL IDs and Lxx mappings
data/canvas_format_specs.json covers named canvas formats, viewBox values, content areas, text minimums, and image fit policies for PPT, social, article-header, banner, story, and print planning
data/visual_asset_acquisition_taxonomy.json covers acquisition modes, statuses, page roles, text policies, AI rendering locks, palette behavior, and prompt contract

data/image_generation_providers.json declares safe provider presets for OpenAI SDK, OpenAI-compatible HTTP, Jimeng proxy with X-API-Key, and HiAPI-style async task image generation without storing secrets, while treating Nanobanana, Seedream/即梦, and other providers as optional setup routes until their endpoint, model, and auth contract are verified

scripts/recommend_style.py searches design, magazine, and ppt-master case style libraries by default, treats route labels as routing signals rather than generic keyword spam, and expands Chinese literature/culture terms such as 蒲松龄/聊斋/狐鬼/古典文学 toward eastern-culture narrative case styles
references/image-text-layout-patterns.md documents image roles, crop policy, text safe areas, contrast policy, and ITL-to-Lxx usage

references/image-text-integration-contract.md documents required media-rich slide fields, foreground roles, safe areas, integration modifiers, evidence boundaries, failure signals, and repair moves for ppt-master-grade image/text fusion

references/ppt-design-generation-methodology.md documents the Qiaomu-owned reusable PPT design generation methodology across source truth, audience state change, story, proof structure, composition grammar, media relationship, renderer recipe, verification, and reusable learning

references/ppt-design-generation-methodology.md records HTML design-agent workflow lessons from public research snapshots while explicitly forbidding copied prompt wording, host-specific components, proprietary tool APIs, and screenshot-backed PPTX as the default editable route

references/canvas-image-layout-spec.md documents multi-canvas format selection, side-by-side ratio math, portrait overrides, multi-image layout plans, handoff fields, current renderer boundary, and anti-patterns
references/visual-asset-acquisition.md documents visual asset acquisition manifests, AI/web/user/source/formula/placeholder routes, status evidence, and QA rules

references/codex-image-backgrounds.md exists and documents background intensity by slide role, including expressive cover/closing imagery, quiet low-distraction middle-slide surfaces, and the rule that AI backgrounds must not invent source/product/music props

references/ppt-visual-failure-patterns.md exists
scripts/check_project.py enforces visual_contract.json for decks over 8 slides

scripts/check_project.py validates visual_asset_manifest.json status, file evidence, AI prompt sidecars, source provenance, terminal asset status when exports exist, warns when source image_candidates are ignored by visual_asset_manifest.json, and can fail strict final-quality checks when AI assets still use procedural-preview-fallback
scripts/check_project.py enforces preview_gate.json for decks over 7 slides
scripts/check_project.py enforces connector perimeter/port policy

scripts/check_project.py enforces formal HTML readability_qa, browser screenshot evidence, fixed-stage positioning, slide-title parity, and html_delivery_manifest motion_system linkage when authored HTML motion is declared

scripts/validate_html_deck.py validates optional html_motion_manifest.json entries for motion level, local GSAP/Lottie assets, reduced-motion policy, static fallback, Lottie autoplay boundaries, and HTML target anchors

scripts/check_project.py validates export_manifest.json success paths, checks PDF/parity/Keynote freshness against the PPTX source, validates keynote_capability report evidence when present, and keeps formal HTML separate from parity HTML
scripts/check_project.py enforces max-three active color budget
scripts/check_project.py enforces non-functional decorative line ban in background policy
scripts/check_project.py enforces atmosphere-only generated backgrounds and editable foreground layout objects
scripts/check_project.py enforces procedural CSS/Canvas/SVG fallback policy for decks over 8 slides
